subcodes.first_line: A Book sent down in truth from God, thy Lord and the Lord of all worlds, that it may repeatedly draw thee unto the Call [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: کتاب نزل بالحق من لدی الله ربک و رب العالمین لیجذبک الندآء مره بعد اخری الی
subcodes.subjects: @consolation and comfort, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @praise and encouragement, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @service to others; to the Cause of God
